title: The Hornet Cloak!
description: Welcome to "The Hornet Cloak!" pack! This set of resources changes the texture of the netherite armor on the character and in their inventory to the texture of the Hornet cloak. Well, that's about it.
body:
Welcome to "The Hornet Cloak!" pack! This set of resources changes the texture of the netherite armor on the character and in their inventory to the texture of the Hornet cloak from Hollow Knight. Well, that's about it.


![Cloak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2e6ecd8bc977d9ffb410707dc016eaf8400ca3f.png)
